title: agent_trust_score
description: Composite agent reliability rating for ACP/ERC-8004 agents. Scores on ACP performance (40%), network position (25%), operational health (25%), metadata compliance (10%).

attestation.description: Request EIP-712 signed attestation (Base chain ID 8453)

acp_performance.description: ACP job success rate score (40% weight)

network_position.description: Network centrality and connections score (25% weight)

operational_health.description: Uptime, response time, error rate score (25% weight)

review_integrity.description: Sybil-aware review integrity scoring via on-chain wallet age analysis. Absent when agent has <10 reviews or data is unavailable.

modifier.description: Multiplier applied to composite trust score

same_day_pct.description: Percentage of reviewers whose wallets were created the same day as their review (0-100)

low_history_pct.description: Percentage of reviewers with wallets under 30 days old (0-100)

sybil_flags.description: Detected sybil patterns (empty array if clean)

clustering.description: Batch wallet creation data if detected, null otherwise

attestation.description: EIP-712 signed attestation (only present when requested)
